---
title: 'John Wolfe (03/04/1927 -- 02/11/2012) & Betty Wolfe (?? -??)'
date: '2017-12-03T09:28:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe Family Tree'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6924964776347655206'
blogger_filename: '/2017/12/john-wolfe-03041927-betty-wolfe.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe Family Tree/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-w-wolfe-1-7a19a7f146dd.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1215" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-w-wolfe-1-8f9267aea487.jpg" width="484" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-w-wolfe-2-7a5818a24d0f.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1229" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-w-wolfe-2-9039da65c919.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-betty-wolfe-pics-1-1c6c117fcdb1.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1235" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-betty-wolfe-pics-1-852d8e6b9c00.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-betty-wolfe-pics-2-aeb2779b90cd.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1217" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-betty-wolfe-pics-2-e1c4f1d0035a.jpg" width="486" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br /><br /><div class="obituary-text" style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #404f57; font-family: &quot;PT Serif&quot;; font-size: 18px;">John Wolfe, 84, of Weiser died Feb. 11, 2012 in Weiser. Family services will be held at a later date. Thomason Funeral Home and Crematory. Condolences to the family&nbsp;<a class="obit-text-link" href="http://www.lienkaemper-thomason.com/" rel="nofollow, noindex" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #006699;" target="_blank">www.lienkaemper-thomason.com</a>&nbsp;549-1234</div><br style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #404f57; font-family: &quot;PT Serif&quot;; font-size: 18px;" /><div class="flower-tree" style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #404f57; font-family: &quot;PT Serif&quot;; font-size: 18px;">To Plant Memorial Trees in memory, please visit our&nbsp;<a class="tree" data-trackclick="yes" data-vars-event-action="janus_treesbutton" data-vars-event-category="janus" data-vars-event-label="janus_obit" data-vars-event-value="0" href="https://sympathy.legacy.com/en-us/funeral-flowers/name/john-wolfe-funeral-flowers/p155872181/?affiliateId=1841&amp;pm=240" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #006699;">Sympathy Store</a>.</div><div class="obituary-publish-line" style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #404f57; font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; padding: 40px 0px;"><span style="box-sizing: border-box;">Published in Idaho Press Tribune on Feb. 14, 2012.</span></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
